description.name: Alpine Escape Chalet
description.headline: Newly listed chalet with hot tub below Mont Blanc
description.description: A freshly renovated three-bedroom chalet on the edge of Chamonix, with a wood fire, a private hot tub on the deck, and mountain views from every window. Ski lifts and the town centre are both a short drive away. This is a brand-new listing.

policies.cancellation_policy: Full refund if cancelled at least 60 days before check-in.
policies.payment_schedule: 50% deposit at booking, balance due 60 days before arrival.
